title: 1.1: Adds `_pkt_ls(obj, verbose=False)` function in `scapy/packet.py` that returns field metadata as list
1.2: Documentation renders Packet `fields_desc` as a structured table with field names, types, and defaults
1.3: Documentation renders `payload_guess` attribute showing which layers can follow which

1.4: Removes 'module' suffix from all 199 RST module page titles (including scapy.packet, scapy.fields, scapy.volatile, scapy.layers.inet, scapy.contrib.ospf, scapy.ansmachine, scapy.config, scapy.automaton, scapy.asn1fields, scapy.dadict, ...)

1.5: Removes all 11 'Submodules' section headers from 11 RST parent pages (including scapy.contrib.automotive.bmw, scapy.contrib.automotive.gm, scapy.contrib.automotive.obd.iid, scapy.contrib.automotive.obd.mid, scapy.contrib.automotive.obd.pid, scapy.contrib.automotive.obd.tid, scapy.contrib.automotive.obd, scapy.contrib.automotive, scapy.contrib.scada.iec104, scapy.layers.tls.crypto, ...)
1.6: Removes all 4 'Subpackages' section headers from 4 RST parent pages (scapy.contrib.automotive, scapy.contrib.automotive.obd, scapy.contrib.scada, scapy.layers.tls)
1.7: Changes `AutoTime` class in `scapy/volatile.py` to inherit from `RandNum` with `__init__(self, base=None)`
2.1: Includes docstrings in new Python files created for documentation processing
4.1: Produces documentation containing raw Python object repr strings (such as '<scapy.fields.ByteField object at 0x...>') in Packet class pages
4.2: Deletes essential documentation files (such as doc/scapy/usage.rst) from the repository
